definition:
1. a disposition, arrangement , (Plato Philosophus) 
2. the composition  in a work of art, as opposite to εὕρεσις, (Plato Philosophus) 
3. a disposition  of property, = διαθήκη, (Plato Philosophus) 
4. a disposing of, selling, sale , (Plutarch) 
5. a  man's disposition , (Plato Philosophus) (ML)
